strName.description: The code name of the ticker, as referred to from JsonCondOwner.aTickers.

strCondLoot.description: Loot table fired each tick. Refers to entry within loot.json. (Per JsonTicker decomp.)

strCondLootCoeff.description: Coefficient condition whose value scales the per-tick loot effect. Refers to entry within conditions.json.

strCondUpdate.description: Condition updated by this ticker each tick. Refers to entry within conditions.json.
